message.content:
CHANNEL-AGNOSTIC • SMART FOLLOW-UP  

Start on WhatsApp — Reach Customers Anywhere  

The request goes out on the channel your customer actually responds to. Same logic, same routing — WhatsApp, SMS, or Email.  

**WhatsApp**  
- Default channel — 80% open rate, instant reply buttons.  

**SMS**  
- Fallback for customers without WhatsApp — universal reach.  

**Email**  
- Rich, branded request with one-tap rating links.  


No response? Automatic follow-up after 2 days.  
One gentle reminder is sent on the same channel. Still no reply — the contact is closed out automatically, so no customer is ever pestered.
